final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration
Asset type: anime key visual, action scene
Primary request: basketball player mid-air performing a slam dunk with sweat flying, dynamic motion blur, intense energy
Scene/backdrop: packed basketball arena, cheering crowd in background with camera flashes
Subject: athletic basketball player in mid-jump, muscular build, jersey visible, intense determined expression, sweat droplets frozen in motion
Style/medium: shonen anime illustration, dynamic action style, cel-shaded with motion lines
Composition/framing: dynamic low-angle shot emphasizing height and power, diagonal composition
Lighting/mood: dramatic arena spotlights mixed with flash photography bursts, high energy and passionate
Color palette: saturated warm tones, orange court, cool blue jersey contrast, bright white flash highlights
Materials/textures: smooth cel-shaded skin, fabric jersey folds, glossy sweat droplets, motion blur streaks
Constraints: keep the player as central focal point, emphasize vertical jump height and athletic power
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, static pose, muted colors, realistic proportions, watermark
